shows.blurb: Solid Thursday lineup with Nikki Glaser, Colin Quinn, and Dan Soder—all proven club performers who work the room well, though Thursday traditionally sees fewer major drop-ins as headliners leave town for weekend gigs.

shows.blurb: Brett Goldstein (Ted Lasso) and Keith Robinson headline another Wednesday bill. The marquee name plus mid-week timing makes this a strong bet for surprise guests testing new material.
